_description: CPU socket to processor family mappings. Used for motherboard-CPU compatibility checks.

AM4.notes: Most popular AMD platform. B550/X570 recommended for Ryzen 5000. BIOS update may be needed for newer CPUs on older boards.

AM5.notes: DDR5 only. AM5 is long-term platform -- AMD committed to support through 2027+. B650 is sweet spot for most users.

LGA1700.notes: DDR4 vs DDR5 depends on motherboard -- not interchangeable. Z690/Z790 for overclocking. B760 best value. 13th/14th Gen i9 had stability issues -- check microcode updates.

LGA1851.notes: DDR5 only. New architecture with efficiency cores. Platform still maturing. Z890 for overclocking.

sTR5.notes: HEDT/Workstation platform. WRX90 for Threadripper PRO. Very high cost.

AM4.notes: AM4 mount is widespread -- almost all coolers support it

AM5.mounting: AM5 (backwards compatible with AM4 mounting holes)
AM5.notes: Most AM4 coolers work on AM5 with existing brackets or free adapter kits

LGA1700.notes: Requires LGA1700 bracket -- older 115x/1200 coolers need adapter kit
